summary: The video shows a snowy residential street with two cars traveling in opposite directions. One car approaches from the opposite direction and passes by closely beside the camera vehicle.

events_timeline.event: A silver sedan approaches from the opposite direction and passes by closely beside the camera vehicle.

uncertainties: The speed of the silver sedan is unclear.
It is uncertain whether the silver sedan maintains a safe distance from the camera vehicle.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or loss of control.
